title: cystopteris alpina var. regia
intro: Cystopteris alpina var. regia, also known as Royal Cystopteris, is a rare and endangered species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Cystopteris alpina var. regia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
